description: Coding task prompt normalizes to base schema with all fields populated
input: Build a REST API with Express.js that has CRUD endpoints for managing blog posts. Each post should have a title, body, author, and tags. Use MongoDB for storage and add input validation.

description: Vague prompt still produces valid structured output with null optional fields
input: Help me write something that processes data from a file and outputs results

description: Complex multi-constraint prompt captures all constraints as array items
input: Create a user authentication system that supports OAuth2, requires MFA for admin accounts, locks accounts after 5 failed attempts, uses bcrypt for password hashing, stores sessions in Redis with 24-hour expiry, and logs all auth events to CloudWatch.
